name: Salesforce
description: The company offers resources for Customer Journey Mapping, emphasizing the importance of creating lasting relationships at every step. With their Service Cloud, they enable businesses to provide outstanding customer service while driving 1-to-1 engagement.

name: FullStory
description: FullStory offers a customer journey mapping tool that allows businesses to build and analyze user journeys effectively. Their platform helps enhance customer experience by providing insights into user behavior and ensuring that all paths lead to user success.

name: Customer Journey Consultancy Ltd
description: Customer Journey Consultancy specializes in customer journey mapping, helping clients from various sectors to enhance their customer experiences. Their expertise in this area allows them to effectively identify and optimize customer journeys, ultimately maximizing value for customers and stakeholders.

name: Appnovation
description: The company emphasizes the importance of Customer Journey Mapping as a powerful tool for enhancing customer experience (CX) in the financial services sector. Their guide offers strategies that can help companies align their goals and improve customer interactions, ultimately leading to better returns and a more impactful customer experience.

name: Milkymap
description: Milkymap offers a comprehensive customer journey mapping tool that allows users to design, share, and enhance the customer experience through various touchpoints. Their approach is adaptable for diverse target groups, making it a valuable resource for effectively managing and visualizing customer journeys.

name: JourneyTrack
description: JourneyTrack.io specializes in customer journey mapping and experience optimization through its enterprise-grade SaaS platform. It offers tools for collaboration, insights, and action planning, enabling organizations to create and manage user journeys effectively.

name: Survey2Connect
description: Survey2Connect offers a robust research platform that enhances decision-making by capturing feedback at various touchpoints, which is essential for effective customer journey mapping. Their key features include automatic journey visualization, advanced sentiment analysis, and the ability to track Net Promoter Score (NPS) at every stage of the customer journey, all aimed at providing deeper insights and personalized experiences.

name: Journey
description: Journey is a global innovation and design studio that specializes in creating next-gen customer experiences by seamlessly integrating digital and physical interactions into a coherent customer journey. With over 50 years of collective expertise, Journey helps clients anticipate the future and engage consumers through immersive and impactful experiences.

name: Omnichannel International
description: Omnichannel specializes in customer journey mapping, offering a range of services that enhance customer experience management. Their expertise in CX strategy design and customer insights research further supports effective customer journey development.

name: CX Pilots
description: The company specializes in customer experience (CX) consultancy, focusing on employee and customer-centric strategies that enhance partnerships and improve overall performance. Their expertise includes journey mapping, which is integral to understanding and optimizing the customer journey.
